zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Henry Hughes I於1246年8月1日出生在英國英格蘭維爾爾時，他的父親Sir Mathew Hughes31歲，母親Agnes de Sanford28歲。他於1280年與Margaret de Clayton在英國薩默塞特結婚。他去世於1290年7月23日在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾格亞特 米森登享年43歲，埋葬在英國素可哈廷。

nameMeanings.name: Hughes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Welsh: variant of Hugh with genitival or excrescent -s.
Irish and Scottish: adopted as an equivalent of Gaelic surnames based on the personal name Aodh ‘fire’, for example Ó hAodha, Mac Aodha; see McCoy and compare McHugh .

variants.name: Hugh
meanings: English, Welsh, and Scottish (of Norman origin): from the Old French personal name Hue, from ancient Germanic Hugo (ultimately derived from hugi- ‘mind, spirit’). This was a very popular name in England after the Norman Conquest, partly due to the reputation of Saint Hugh of Lincoln (1140–1200), who was born in Burgundy and who established the first Carthusian monastery in England.
Scottish and Irish: adopted as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic personal name Aodh, a derivative of a Gaelic word meaning ‘fire’. See Hughes .
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surnames 邱 and 丘, based on their Hakka pronunciation; see   Qiu   1 and 2.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Henry Hughes I was born on 1 August 1246, in Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Mathew Hughes, was 31 and his mother, Agnes de Sanford, was 28. He married Margaret de Clayton in 1280, in Somerset, England. He died on 23 July 1290, in Great Missenden, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 43, and was buried in Harting, Sussex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Henry Hughes I est né le 1 août 1246, à Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Mathew Hughes, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Agnes de Sanford, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Margaret de Clayton en 1280, à Somerset, Angleterre. Il est décédé le 23 juillet 1290, à Great Missenden, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 43 ans, et a été enterré à Harting, Sussex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Henry Hughes I am 1. August 1246 in Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Mathew Hughes 31 und seine Mutter Agnes de Sanford 28. Er hat 1280 in Somerset, England Margaret de Clayton geheiratet. Er starb am 23. Juli 1290 im Alter von 43 Jahren in Great Missenden, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Harting, Sussex, England begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Henry Hughes Iが1246年8月1日にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir Mathew Hughesは31歳，母Agnes de Sanfordは28歳であった。1280年にイギリスソメルセトでMargaret de Claytonと結婚した。彼は1290年7月23日にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアグレアト ミセンデンで43歳で死去し，イギリススセックスハーティングにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Henry Hughes I(이)가 1246년 8월 1일 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Mathew Hughes(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes de Sanford(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1280년 영국 서머세트에서 Margaret de Clayton(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1290년 7월 23일 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 그리트 미센든에서 43세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수세스 하틴그에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Henry Hughes I nasceu em 1 de agosto de 1246, em Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Mathew Hughes, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Agnes de Sanford, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret de Clayton em 1280, em Somerset, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 23 de julho de 1290, em Great Missenden, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 43 anos, e foi sepultado em Harting, Sussex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Henry Hughes I родился 1 августа 1246 г. в местности уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Mathew Hughes было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Agnes de Sanford, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret de Clayton в 1280 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия. Он умер 23 июля 1290 г. в местности грит миссенден, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 43 лет и был похоронен в местности хартинг, суссекс, Англия.
